login.subtitle: Sign in with a local administrator account.

projects.noLinkedSystems: No systems linked to this project.

records.historicalWarningList: Historical version — read-only. Restore creates a new version.
records.historicalWarningDetail: You are viewing a historical version. It is read-only; restoring creates a new version.
records.supersededWarning: This record has been superseded by a newer current configuration in the same series.

search.title: Search
search.subtitle: Full-text search across knowledge records in a workspace.

admin.title: Admin
admin.overviewBlurb: Platform administration for users, access, API clients, and audit history.
admin.mcpWizardBlurb: Guided steps to create an API client, verify the connection, and copy schemas for Cursor, ChatGPT, Gemini, Copilot, and OpenWebUI.
admin.mcpWizardPreflightBlurb: Confirm the API is healthy and ready before creating an LLM client.
admin.mcpWizardPublicUrlHint: Use when Cursor must reach the API through a reverse proxy or different hostname. Leave empty to use API_URL or MCP_PUBLIC_URL. Host-only values get /mcp appended.
admin.mcpWizardConfigureBlurb: Choose the target LLM platform, access mode, and workspace. The matching schema is generated at the end.
admin.mcpWizardTargetClientHint: Select which platform you will connect. This chooses the config format shown in the last step.
admin.mcpWizardActingUserRequired: Draft write requires an acting user.
admin.mcpWizardMissingFields: Name, organization, and workspace are required.
admin.mcpWizardClientCreated: Client “{name}” is ready. Copy the token now.
admin.mcpWizardTestBlurb: Initialize MCP, list tools, and optionally call search_knowledge.
admin.mcpWizardClientBlurb_cursor: Paste into Cursor MCP settings or `.cursor/mcp.json`, then reload MCP servers.
admin.mcpWizardClientBlurb_chatgpt: Create a Custom GPT Action: import the OpenAPI schema, then set authentication to API Key (Bearer) with your token.
admin.mcpWizardClientBlurb_gemini: Use MCP config with Gemini CLI, import the OpenAPI schema into OpenAPI-capable clients, or pass functionDeclarations to the Gemini API.
admin.mcpWizardClientBlurb_copilot: Import the Swagger 2.0 file as a Copilot Studio / Power Platform custom connector (MCP streamable).
admin.mcpWizardClientBlurb_openwebui: Prefer native MCP (Streamable HTTP), or add an OpenAPI external tool pointing at the published schema URL.
admin.mcpWizardClientHint1_cursor: Keep the bearer token secret; treat it like a password.
admin.mcpWizardClientHint2_cursor: After pasting, open Cursor Settings → MCP and confirm the server is connected.
admin.mcpWizardClientHint3_cursor: Try a prompt that uses search_knowledge against your workspace.
admin.mcpWizardClientHint1_chatgpt: The API host must be reachable from OpenAI (public HTTPS URL).
admin.mcpWizardClientHint2_chatgpt: In Actions auth, choose API Key / Bearer and paste the issued token.
admin.mcpWizardClientHint3_chatgpt: You can also Import from URL using the openApiUrl in the auth snippet.
admin.mcpWizardClientHint1_gemini: Gemini CLI can use the MCP JSON similarly to Cursor.
admin.mcpWizardClientHint2_gemini: functionDeclarations are sanitized for Gemini’s OpenAPI subset.
admin.mcpWizardClientHint3_gemini: OpenAPI clients should call the same `/api/v1/llm/tools/*` endpoints with Bearer auth.
admin.mcpWizardClientHint1_copilot: Use x-ms-agentic-protocol mcp-streamable-1.0 (included in the schema).
admin.mcpWizardClientHint2_copilot: Set connector auth to API key on header Authorization with value Bearer <token>.
admin.mcpWizardClientHint3_copilot: Host/port come from your public MCP URL; update the override if needed.
admin.mcpWizardClientHint1_openwebui: Admin → Connections / External Tools → add MCP or OpenAPI server.
admin.mcpWizardClientHint2_openwebui: For OpenAPI type, point at `/api/v1/llm/openapi.json` and send the Bearer header.
admin.mcpWizardClientHint3_openwebui: mcpo is optional here — native MCP HTTP is preferred when available.
admin.organizationsBlurb: Create and edit organizations (name and slug). Slugs must be unique.
admin.organizationDeleteConfirm: Delete “{name}”? Choose whether to transfer inherited items, or permanently delete them with the organization.
admin.organizationDeleteLastHint: Cannot delete the last remaining organization.
admin.organizationDeleteDisposition: What should happen to inherited items?
admin.organizationDeleteModeTransfer: Transfer workspaces, tags, and API clients to another organization (recommended)
admin.organizationDeleteModeDestroy: Permanently delete all inherited items — do not transfer
admin.organizationDestroyWarning1: Warning 1 of 2: Deleting “{name}” this way permanently removes its workspaces ({count}), tags, and API clients. This cannot be undone.
admin.organizationDestroyWarning2: Warning 2 of 2: Confirm you want to wipe every inherited item for “{name}”. Nothing will be moved to another organization.
admin.organizationDestroyAcknowledge: I understand that workspaces, tags, and API clients will be permanently deleted and cannot be recovered.
admin.organizationDestroyConfirmFinal: Delete organization and all inherited items
admin.organizationDestroyDoubleConfirmRequired: Acknowledge both destroy warnings before permanently deleting inherited items.
admin.organizationTransferHint: Choose which organization should receive workspaces, tags, and API clients.
admin.organizationTransferAutoHint: Only one organization remains — items will transfer to “{target}”.
admin.organizationTransferRequired: Select an organization to receive inherited items before deleting.
admin.organizationWorkspaceCount: {count, plural, =0 {No workspaces} one {# workspace} other {# workspaces}}
admin.slugOptionalHint: Optional — derived from the name if left empty
admin.organizationSlugHint: Slug is used in URLs and integrations. Changing it does not move existing workspaces.
admin.auditBlurb: Search, filter by day or date range, page through platform audit events, and export the current filtered view.
admin.auditExportHint: Exports use the current filters (not only this page). Each export is itself recorded in the audit log.
admin.auditExportTooLarge: Too many matching events ({count}). Narrow filters to at most {max} before exporting.
admin.auditResultCount: {count, plural, =0 {No events} one {# event} other {# events}}
admin.tokenOnce: Copy this token now. It will not be shown again.
admin.toastOrganizationDeletedTransferred: Organization “{name}” deleted. Inherited items moved to “{target}”.
admin.toastOrganizationDeletedDestroyed: Organization “{name}” deleted. All inherited items were permanently removed.
admin.toastApiClientCreated: API client “{name}” created. Copy the token now.
admin.toastApiClientRotated: API client token rotated. Copy the new token now.
admin.writeScopeHint: knowledge:write requires an acting user and at least one workspace allowlist entry.
